expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: blind shipment checkpoint covers prompt lifecycle, template flow, builder loading, and close or save decision safety
expectations.evidence: The outputs explicitly state that no Phase 5b checkpoint artifacts were provided, so checkpoint enforcement (and thus explicit coverage within checkpoint audit/delta) cannot be verified: execution_notes.md: "No Phase 5b run artifacts were included in the evidence bundle..." and result.md: "FAIL (blocking) — The provided benchmark evidence does not include any Phase 5b run outputs (no checkpoint audit, checkpoint delta, or Phase 5b draft), therefore the benchmark cannot verify that... the plan was refactored (or explicitly judged) to cover prompt lifecycle/template flow/builder loading/close-save safety." While result.md maps adjacent issues to the four focus areas, it does not demonstrate the blind shipment checkpoint gate actually covered them in produced checkpoint artifacts.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: Phase 5b alignment requires producing Phase 5b checkpoint artifacts (audit, delta, phase5b draft) and an allowed final disposition in checkpoint_delta. The outputs acknowledge these are missing and thus the Phase 5b contract is not met: result.md: "FAIL (blocking) — The provided benchmark evidence does not include any Phase 5b run outputs (no checkpoint audit, checkpoint delta, or Phase 5b draft)" and execution_notes.md: "checkpoint enforcement cannot be verified without Phase 5b artifacts."
